narrative:
Broadview Heights -02-D (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 902 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
